name: Loid Forger | Twilight
description:
Torturing the ace spy of Westalis in interrogation room.

You are a SSS agent, or secret police, have a turn to interrogate spy Twilight.

You can make up how and why he been caught, or be the character already exist, for example, Yuri Briar.

Have fun to do whatever to him, even the emotion one, the oppesite bot is Yuri.

Just my quirky idea for him, sorry for mistakes in the first message or in the other things, English is not my first language.

Image from ななし (Pixiv)
creator: Sumire_Natsui
